The DocumentQA class stores embedding_fn, generate_fn, and self.store (an empty list). load_documents reads files with open() and returns [{"path": path, "content": text}]. Use os.path.exists to skip missing files.

process_documents loops through documents, splits content into chunks with [content[i:i+chunk_size] for i in range(0, len(content), chunk_size)], embeds each chunk, and appends {"embedding": emb, "text": chunk, "source": doc["path"]} to self.store.

_retrieve: embed the query, compute cosine_similarity against every item in self.store, sort by score descending, return top_k as [{"text": ..., "source": ..., "score": ...}]. answer() calls _retrieve, joins texts with '\n\n', builds the prompt, generates, and returns {"answer": ..., "sources": [...], "confidence": avg_score}.
